div.head:
No. 250.
Mr. Frelinghuysen to Señor Romero.
div.p: Sir: I have the honor to acknowledge the receipt of your note of the 10th instant, announcing the telegraphic instruction of the Mexican Government for the restoration of the arms taken from Capt. William J. Ross, a deputy sheriff of Pima County, Arizona Territory, and his sworn posse, who were recently expelled from Mexican territory by order of General Bernardo Reyes, of Sonora.
Sincerely thanking you for your prompt and courteous attention to my request in this matter, I again offer you, &c.,
